transcript: Yes, this is John with Max Service Medical Services. How are you today, sir?

[slurred] Does it give you a good sensation?
I mean, yes, this is the Watson brand, sir. The original ones.
Uhhhhhh. [accented, slurred] I take the forty-two hundred strength.

That you see a moon? Okay.

No, sir, no, we... no, no, no, I'm not on the loose.
I just got bit by a goose.
'[sampled]' Alright everyone, shut your cake hole!

Okay. Can you please tell me your date of birth?
Is your shipping address, sir, would it be the--
Is your shipping address, would it be the same as the billing?

Can you please tell me what is that, uh, middle initial?
Hold... hold on just a minute.

That's great. Okay, um... give me a second... would you like to purchase your order?
Yeah. Are you ready to demonstrate?
Why... why... why do you aks?
'Cause I'm on a moose right now.

No, it ain't no routine. You want to purchase a order of hydrocodone, correct?
Look, can I ask you... can I ask you a question?
Mm, I don't... understand that question.
I don't know what you mean, "on the loose". What do you mean by, uh... um... besides "the loose".
Besides the loose. What do you mean by "loose". I don't know what "the loose" is.
If you can explain to me... if you can explain to me what you mean by "the loose", or "am I loose", then I can give you a correct answer.
Okay. Do you have a middle initial?
Mmhmm. I'm 'onna take a bull whip to ya ass.

I'm 'onna kick ya in the ass.
Have a great... nah, take... take it easy in the park, alright? The computer froze, and we can't purchase your order.
